command: python -m pytest tests/test_scheduler_catchup.py tests/test_dashboard_app.py tests/test_qc_validator_dhan_aliases.py tests/test_qc_runtime_anomaly.py -v

required_scenarios_covered.scenario: Missed job within catch-up window fires once
Missed job outside catch-up window does not fire
Restart after scheduled time does not permanently hide job status
Same job does not fire twice for same date/time
Market-dependent job does not catch up when market closed
Paper lifecycle job does not run without broker proof
Paper lifecycle job does not run without valid option contract proof
Post-market proof pack does not run before upstream artifacts exist
Scheduler health reports pending/missed/catchup status instead of empty jobs when applicable

regression_check: All 19 pre-existing tests (test_dashboard_app.py, test_qc_validator_dhan_aliases.py, test_qc_runtime_anomaly.py) still pass unchanged — scheduler catch-up changes introduced no regressions.
